text: Top Class College Education for OBC, EBC, and DNT (PM-YASASVI) Purpose: Full financial support for students from OBC/EBC/DNT categories for studies beyond Class XII in notified institutions. Eligibility: Annual family income up to ₹2.50 lakh; secured admission in full-time prescribed course. Benefits: Scholarship continues until course completion subject to performance. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

text: Top Class Education Scheme for SC Students Purpose: Support SC students in premier notified institutions (IITs, IIMs, NITs). Eligibility: SC category; annual family income up to ₹8 lakh; max 2 siblings per family. Benefits: Full tuition fees, non-refundable charges, academic allowance for living/books, and one-time grant for a computer/laptop. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

text: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship Scheme for NER Purpose: Special scholarship for students from the North Eastern Region. Eligibility: Domicile of NER states; passed Class XII within NER; 1st year of general/technical UG course; family income ≤ ₹4.5 lakh. Benefits: Monthly scholarship for UG duration; rates vary by course type. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

PG Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child Purpose: Support for single girl children pursuing PG courses. Eligibility: Only child (or twins/fraternal daughters) in family; age ≤ 30; 1st year Master's degree at regular institution. Benefits: ₹36,200 per annum for 2 years (full PG duration). Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/) with affidavit.

PG Merit Scholarship for University Rank Holders Purpose: Financial aid for 1st and 2nd UG rank holders to pursue PG. Eligibility: 1st/2nd rank at UG (BA/BSc/BCom) with ≥ 60% marks; admitted to regular Master's; age ≤ 30. Benefits: Financial assistance of ₹3,100/month (₹37,200/year) for 2 years. Application: Online via National Scholarship Portal (https://scholarships.gov.in/).

National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) Purpose: Provide earn-while-learn opportunities with industrial exposure. Eligibility: Age 14+; minimum educational qualification for the specific trade. Benefits: Industrial exposure, skill certification, and stipend; govt shares stipend cost with employers. Application: Register and apply via Apprenticeship India portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/).
